title: Design a Business Card
description: A styled business card component centered on the page. The card includes a profile image, name, designation, company, contact details, a portfolio link, and social media links. CSS covers background colors, border, padding, centered layout with auto margins, image sizing, link styling, and a social media section.
objectives: Center a fixed-width card using margin: auto
Style an image with max-width, fixed dimensions, and a border
Remove text decoration from anchor elements
Apply consistent margin to p elements
Use background-color, padding, and border on a container element
Link an external stylesheet from the head element
